comment: The vc17 solution (vc17/otclient.sln) remains the canonical Windows build path for AstraClient.
This CMakePresets.json defines the parallel cross-platform build path, enabled in Phase 0
and exercised in later phases (Linux/macOS CI, headless tooling). The vc17 .sln is the source
of truth for shipping Windows binaries; CMake is the portable mirror.
Triplet x64-windows-static matches the vc17 /MT static-CRT configuration so the vcpkg
binary cache is shared between both build paths.

configurePresets.name: windows-x64-static
configurePresets.description: Parallel CMake path mirroring the vc17 static-CRT Windows build. The vc17 .sln remains the canonical Windows build; this preset is the portable mirror enabled in P0 and exercised later (Linux/macOS CI, headless tooling). Triplet x64-windows-static matches vc17 /MT so the vcpkg cache is shared.
